query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (
                user_id,
                user_email,
                user_role,
                action,
                resource_type,
                resource_id,
                new_values,
                status,
                ip_address,
                user_agent,
                request_method,
                request_path
            )
            SELECT
                u.id,
                u.email,
                u.role,
                'verify_email',
                'user',
                u.id,
                jsonb_build_object('verification_level', u.verification_level),
                'success',
                $2::text::inet,
                $3,
                'POST',
                '/auth/verify/email/confirm'
            FROM users u
            WHERE u.id = $1
